---
title: "item_bodily_distress_syndrome_checklist"
subtitle: "`item_bodily_distress_syndrome_checklist`"
description: "item_bodily_distress_syndrome_checklist"
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

- Path: `resources/item_bodily_distress_syndrome_checklist/data.parquet`
- Primary key: (`event`)

| Name                            | Title                         | Type   | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|---------------------------------|-------------------------------|--------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `event`                         | The unique name of the event  | string | The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `center`                        | Research center               | string | The research center where the data item was recorded.                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `bds_palpitations_chest`        | bds_palpitations_chest        | string | Participant's experience of palpitations or discomfort in the chest. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                               |
| `bdsq_chest_pressure_pain`      | bdsq_chest_pressure_pain      | string | Participant's experience of pressure or pain in the chest. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                         |
| `bdsq_shortness_breath_at_rest` | bdsq_shortness_breath_at_rest | string | Participant's experience of shortness of breath at rest. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                         |
| `bdsq_breathing_attack`         | bdsq_breathing_attack         | string | Participant's experience of attacks with breathing difficulty. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                     |
| `bdsq_dry_mouth`                | bdsq_dry_mouth                | string | Participant's experience of dry mouth. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                             |
| `bdsq_sweating`                 | bdsq_sweating                 | string | Participant's experience of hot or cold sweating. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                  |
| `bdsq_frequent_loose_stools`    | bdsq_frequent_loose_stools    | string | Participant's report of being bothered by frequent loose stools in the past four weeks. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                            |
| `bdsq_abdominal_pain`           | bdsq_abdominal_pain           | string | Participant's report of being bothered by abdominal pain in the past four weeks. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                   |
| `bds_bloating`                  | bds_bloating                  | string | Participant's report of being bothered by bloating, tension, or a feeling of heaviness in the abdomen in the past four weeks. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                      |
| `bds_diarrhea`                  | bds_diarrhea                  | string | Participant's report of being bothered by diarrhea in the past four weeks. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                         |
| `bds_acid_reflux`               | bds_acid_reflux               | string | Participant's report of being bothered by acid reflux (heartburn) in the past four weeks. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                          |
| `bds_nausea`                    | bds_nausea                    | string | Participant's report of being bothered by nausea in the past four weeks. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                           |
| `bds_upper_abdominal_pain`      | bds_upper_abdominal_pain      | string | Participant's report of being bothered by burning sensation or pain in the upper abdomen in the past four weeks. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                   |
| `bds_limbs_pain`                | bds_limbs_pain                | string | Participant's report of being bothered by pain in arms or legs. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                    |
| `bds_muscle_aches`              | bds_muscle_aches              | string | Participant's report of being bothered by muscle aches or soreness. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                |
| `bds_joint_pain`                | bds_joint_pain                | string | Participant's report of being bothered by joint pain. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                              |
| `bds_limbs_numbness`            | bds_limbs_numbness            | string | Participant's report of experiencing a feeling of paralysis in arms or legs. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                       |
| `bds_back_pain`                 | bds_back_pain                 | string | Participant's report of being bothered by back pain. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                               |
| `bds_migratory_pain`            | bds_migratory_pain            | string | Participant's report of being bothered by pain that migrates from one location to another. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                         |
| `bds_paresthesia`               | bds_paresthesia               | string | Participant's report of experiencing unpleasant numbness or sensory disturbances. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                  |
| `bds_concentration_difficulty`  | bds_concentration_difficulty  | string | Participant's report of experiencing difficulty concentrating. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                   |
| `bds_fatigue`                   | bds_fatigue                   | string | Participant's report of experiencing fatigue. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                      |
| `bds_headache`                  | bds_headache                  | string | Participant's report of experiencing headaches. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                    |
| `bds_memory_problems`           | bds_memory_problems           | string | Participant's report of experiencing memory problems. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                              |
| `bds_dizziness`                 | bds_dizziness                 | string | Participant's report of experiencing dizziness. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                    |
| `bds_gp_contact_past6months`    | bds_gp_contact_past6months    | string | Participant's report of having contacted their general practitioner in the past six months due to one or more of the previously reported symptoms. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10). |

: Fields in the `item_bodily_distress_syndrome_checklist` resource.
